artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2025-05-29
artifacts.excerpt: i have quite a few personal rules about posting, but the most important one is to never point out flaws that otherwise wouldn't be noticed or cared for. e.g. you post a picture of yourself and say "don't mind my pimple" now everyone is looking at your pimple. no one would've cared about your pimple before. even if they did, it wouldn't matter. technically, it still doesn't matter, but don't do this type of thing. it's energetically incorrect. or do, but you should listen to me when it comes to posting. when it comes to a lot of things, really. I may sound silly often, but I'm onto something if you pay attention.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, feel, think, don.

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2025-06-25
artifacts.excerpt: my posts about men are the absolute lowest hanging fruit but they usually get the most engagement. I am just a single 25 y.o. woman so of course I think about men and dating and desire a lot. but it's starting to feel so boring. i have little dating experience, idk what men are on about. like no clue. only just recently realized men will lie to me. I dont go on dates. my phone is dry af. dating apps feel like a psychic attack so i dont use them. my friends keep trying to set me up with men who can't remember the last time they picked up a book. I dont feel doom about this tbh I think ill eventually find a partner but gdi i really am a virgin nerd.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: really, feel, think, don.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2025-11-27
artifacts.excerpt: i went to my ex boyfriends funeral today and like 1) what even is anything ever that ever happened what is going on rifht now im so disoriented 2) it feels like a gigantic backlog of my existence was deleted along with his death. how we met, our first month of courting, the first time we had sex, the day his mother died, travelling together, sleeping together, our routines, inside jokes, his incriminating yawn, long conversations, me shaving his beard, laying on his chest, our terrible breakup. now I'm left alone with the task of remembering all of the above. I dont like it.
